problem id: 563d22ab
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) AND SHR(6)) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01111010 -> 00000000
  11110100 -> 00000001
  00011101 -> 00000000
  10010001 -> 00000011
  01101010 -> 00000000
  10011011 -> 00000011
  01111100 -> 00000000
  10011100 -> 00000001

query: 00000000
predicted answer: 00000000
